creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your patch itself looks good but:
o MAINTAINER changed. Previous maintainer <astralblue@usa.net> agreed
  with you?
o Can we use ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}? like below

-MASTER_SITES=  http://download.sourceforge.net/tik/ \
-               http://anti-aol.org/dionysos/l33t_filez/
+MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    tik
